caption: A professional television camera on a tripod is positioned in a stadium, overlooking a lush green soccer pitch. In the background, red stadium seating rises under a bright sky, with a banner reading "GRANADA CF" visible along the stands and the word "PULL" appearing on a red sign. The logo of Real Madrid CF is visible in the upper right of the view. A few people are seen on the field in the distance, including one individual wearing a white shirt. The camera equipment dominates the foreground, including a large monitor and a heavy-duty tripod. Across the frames, there is very little movement; the camera remains stationary, and the figures on the field shift only slightly, maintaining a steady wide shot of the athletic venue.
